---
title: "Raspberry Pi Activity: Room Adventure...Revolutions"
---

## Overview

In this activity, you will modify the Room Adventure game that you created and extended in a previous RPi activity. You will need the following items:

- Raspberry Pi with power adapter

- Display

- Keyboard and mouse

::: {.callout-tip}
If you wish, you can simply bring your laptop with the Python interpreter and your favorite IDE installed since you will not be using the GPIO pins on the RPi.
:::
